🛡Xcloak
💬
Sign In

Exploit Playground

Vulnerable practice environments — run locally with Docker or access online labs

🐳
Docker required for local labs. Install from docs.docker.com. Online labs (HackTheBox, VulnHub) work in-browser without Docker. These are isolated from the XCloak scan engine — run them separately on your machine.
Quick Start Guide
1Install Docker Desktop ↗
2Pick a lab from the list
3Copy & run the docker command
4Open the URL in browser
5Use XCloak's Scanner tab to scan it
Essential Tools
🔥
Burp Suite Community
Web proxy & scanner
↗⚡
OWASP ZAP
Free web scanner
↗🎯
Metasploit
Exploit framework
↗📡
Nmap
Network scanner
↗🦈
Wireshark
Packet analyzer
↗💉
SQLMap
SQL injection tool
↗
⚡
Scan Your Lab
After starting a local lab, use XCloak's scanner to run nmap, nuclei, and nikto against it.
⚡ Open Scanner →
⚠ INTEL
Xcloak v2 — Real data from NVD and OTXUpload PoC exploits · Vote · Earn XPHit SYNC to fetch the latest CVEs
